---
title: "Reinforcement Learning"
comments: false
toc: false
---

<p class="project-page-intro">
Reinforcement learning projects focused on value learning, policy optimization,
actor-critic training, and scalable experiment loops.
</p>

<div class="project-stack">
  <!-- Add DQN GitHub repo URL here -->
  <a class="project-row-card" href="#" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
    <span class="project-row-title">DQN</span>
    <span class="project-row-meta">Replay buffers, target networks, epsilon-greedy control, and value learning</span>
  </a>

  <!-- Add Policy Gradients GitHub repo URL here -->
  <a class="project-row-card" href="#" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
    <span class="project-row-title">Policy Gradients</span>
    <span class="project-row-meta">REINFORCE, baselines, reward normalization, and trajectory sampling</span>
  </a>

  <!-- Add Actor-Critic GitHub repo URL here -->
  <a class="project-row-card" href="#" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
    <span class="project-row-title">Actor-Critic</span>
    <span class="project-row-meta">Advantage estimation, value heads, entropy regularization, and stable updates</span>
  </a>

  <!-- Add PPO GitHub repo URL here -->
  <a class="project-row-card" href="#" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
    <span class="project-row-title">PPO</span>
    <span class="project-row-meta">Clipped objectives, rollout collection, minibatch updates, and policy evaluation</span>
  </a>
</div>
